p1_name_ph: Leave empty to auto-detect channel name
p1_require_kw: Required Keywords (comma-separated, title must contain one)
p2_empty: No tasks. Go to "Add Channel" to start downloading.
p2_quality_changed: Resolution updated. Press Update Check on this channel to re-evaluate already-downloaded videos against the new resolution.
confirm_delete_job: Confirm delete this task? (Downloaded videos are not affected)
p4_hint: The system compares video title similarities to group videos that may be "the same program from different channels". Check items to delete (recommended: keep higher resolution), then click delete.
p4_done_none: Analysis complete, scanned {0} videos, no duplicates
p4_done: Scanned {0} videos, found {1} similar groups ({2} videos)
s_schedule_disabled: Set Max Concurrent Channels to exactly 1 to enable scheduled triggers.
s_full_desc: Fetch the complete video list from YouTube, compare with downloaded records, then download new videos. May take longer for large channels.
s_recent_desc: Only fetch the latest N videos from YouTube for comparison, greatly reducing wait time. Suitable for regular update checks.
s_fast_desc: Skip list pre-fetching, let yt-dlp download the channel URL directly. New videos download immediately, already-downloaded ones are skipped. Does not pre-display video list.
s_usage_1: • Path can be absolute (recommended), e.g. D:\YTVideos
s_usage_2: • Path will be created automatically if it doesn't exist
s_usage_3: • After changing path, new downloads save to the new path; existing videos are not moved
s_usage_4: • Media Library also switches to the new path
s_clipboard_error: Cannot read clipboard, please paste manually
s_subtitle_langs_hint: Manual subtitles in these languages will be downloaded (auto-generated subtitles are excluded)
s_subtitle_priority_hint: First available language is auto-selected when playing
ck_modal_hint: Use the "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" browser extension to export cookies on a YouTube page. Upload here to download age-restricted or members-only videos.
tut_s1_desc: Search and install "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" in the Chrome Web Store
tut_s2_title: Step 2: Log in to YouTube and Watch an Age-restricted Video
tut_s2_desc1: Go to youtube.com and log in — confirm your account avatar appears in the top-right
tut_s2_desc2: Then open any age-restricted video and confirm it plays normally (not showing "Sign in to confirm your age")
tut_s2_warn: ⚠ You must actually play an age-restricted video for Google to write the full auth token into cookies
tut_s3_desc: On that YouTube page, click the extension icon and select "Export All Cookies" (not "Export")
tut_s3_warn: ⚠ Export on the page where you played the age-restricted video, don't switch to other sites first
tut_s4_desc: Upload the exported .txt file to this tool. It will automatically validate the required fields.
cookies_warn_all:
This cookies file does not contain any YouTube login tokens. It will not work for age-restricted videos.

Please make sure:
• Export from a youtube.com page (while logged in)
• Use "Export All Cookies", not "Export"

Upload anyway?
cookies_warn_some:
This cookies file is missing the following YouTube auth fields:
{0}

May affect age-restricted video downloads.

Upload anyway?
